        The reference solution may be wrong, so just refer it, DO NOT translate it.

__data__.output:
```ruby
def solve(nums)
  n = nums.size
  prefix = Array.new(n, 0)
  suffix = Array.new(n, 0)

  # Compute prefix sums where prefix[i] is the sum of the increasing sequence ending at i
  prefix[0] = nums[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
      prefix[i] = prefix[i-1] + nums[i]
    else
      prefix[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  # Compute suffix sums where suffix[i] is the sum of the increasing sequence starting at i
  suffix[n-1] = nums[n-1]
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
      suffix[i] = suffix[i+1] + nums[i]
    else
      suffix[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  # Compute the maximum prefix sum up to each index
  max_prefix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_prefix[0] = prefix[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    max_prefix[i] = [max_prefix[i-1], prefix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the maximum suffix sum from each index
  max_suffix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_suffix[n-1] = suffix[n-1]
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    max_suffix[i] = [max_suffix[i+1], suffix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the sum of the decreasing sequence between p and q
  decreasing_sum = Array.new(n, 0)
  decreasing_sum[0] = nums[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i-1]
      decreasing_sum[i] = decreasing_sum[i-1] + nums[i]
    else
      decreasing_sum[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY
  (1..n-3).each do |p|
    (p+1..n-2).each do |q|
      if nums[p] > nums[q]
        current_sum = max_prefix[p-1] + decreasing_sum[q] - nums[p] + max_suffix[q+1]
        max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
      end
    end
  end

  max_sum
end
```

  suffix = Array.new(n, 0)

  # Compute prefix sums where prefix[i] is the sum of the increasing sequence ending at i
  prefix[0] = nums[0]

      prefix[i] = prefix[i-1] + nums[i]
    else

    end
  end

  suffix[n-1] = nums[n-1]
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
      suffix[i] = suffix[i+1] + nums[i]
    else
      suffix[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  # Compute the maximum prefix sum up to each index
  max_prefix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_prefix[0] = prefix[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    max_prefix[i] = [max_prefix[i-1], prefix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the maximum suffix sum from each index
  max_suffix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_suffix[n-1] = suffix[n-1]
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    max_suffix[i] = [max_suffix[i+1], suffix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the sum of the decreasing sequence between p and q
  decreasing_sum = Array.new(n, 0)
  decreasing_sum[0] = nums[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i-1]
      decreasing_sum[i] = decreasing_sum[i-1] + nums[i]
    else
      decreasing_sum[i] = nums[i]
    end

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

**三段式子数组** 是一个连续子数组 `nums[l...r]`（满足 `0 <= l < r < n`），并且存在下标 `l < p < q < r`，使得：

- `nums[l...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...r]` **严格** 递增。

请你从数组 `nums` 的所有三段式子数组中找出和最大的那个，并返回其 **最大** 和。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,-2,-1,-3,0,2,-1]

**输出：**-4

**解释：**

选择 `l = 1`, `p = 2`, `q = 3`, `r = 5`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[1...2] = [-2, -1]` 严格递增 (`-2 < -1`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[2...3] = [-1, -3]` 严格递减 (`-1 > -3`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[3...5] = [-3, 0, 2]` 严格递增 (`-3 < 0 < 2`)。
- 和 = `(-2) + (-1) + (-3) + 0 + 2 = -4`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [1,4,2,7]

**输出:** 14

**解释:**

选择 `l = 0`, `p = 1`, `q = 2`, `r = 3`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[0...1] = [1, 4]` 严格递增 (`1 < 4`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[1...2] = [4, 2]` 严格递减 (`4 > 2`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[2...3] = [2, 7]` 严格递增 (`2 < 7`)。
- 和 = `1 + 4 + 2 + 7 = 14`。

 

**提示:**

- `4 <= n = nums.length <= 10e5`
- `-10e9 <= nums[i] <= 10e9`
- 保证至少存在一个三段式子数组。

    else

    end
  end

  # Compute the maximum prefix sum up to each index
  max_prefix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_prefix[0] = prefix[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    max_prefix[i] = [max_prefix[i-1], prefix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the maximum suffix sum from each index
  max_suffix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_suffix[n-1] = suffix[n-1]
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    max_suffix[i] = [max_suffix[i+1], suffix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the sum of the decreasing sequence between p and q
  decreasing_sum = Array.new(n, 0)
  decreasing_sum[0] = nums[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i-1]
      decreasing_sum[i] = decreasing_sum[i-1] + nums[i]
    else
      decreasing_sum[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY
  (1..n-3).each do |p|
    (p+1..n-2).each do |q|
      if nums[p] > nums[q]
        current_sum = max_prefix[p-1] + (decreasing_sum[q] - nums[p]) + max_suffix[q+1]
        max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
      end
    end
  end

  max_sum
end
```

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.size
  prefix = Array.new(n, 0)
  suffix = Array.new(n, 0)

  # Compute prefix sums where prefix[i] is the sum of the increasing sequence ending at i
  prefix[0] = nums[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
      prefix[i] = prefix[i-1] + nums[i]
    else
      prefix[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  # Compute suffix sums where suffix[i] is the sum of the increasing sequence starting at i
  suffix[n-1] = nums[n-1]
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
      suffix[i] = suffix[i+1] + nums[i]
    else
      suffix[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  # Compute the maximum prefix sum up to each index
  max_prefix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_prefix[0] = prefix[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    max_prefix[i] = [max_prefix[i-1], prefix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the maximum suffix sum from each index
  max_suffix = Array.new(n, 0)
  max_suffix[n-1] = suffix[n-1]
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    max_suffix[i] = [max_suffix[i+1], suffix[i]].max
  end

  # Compute the sum of the decreasing sequence between p and q
  decreasing_sum = Array.new(n, 0)
  decreasing_sum[0] = nums[0]
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i-1]
      decreasing_sum[i] = decreasing_sum[i-1] + nums[i]
    else
      decreasing_sum[i] = nums[i]
    end
  end

  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY
  (1..n-3).each do |p|
    (p+1..n-2).each do |q|
      if nums[p] > nums[q]
        current_sum = max_prefix[p-1] + (decreasing_sum[q] - nums[p]) + max_suffix[q+1]
        max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
      end
    end
  end

  max_sum
end

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

**三段式子数组** 是一个连续子数组 `nums[l...r]`（满足 `0 <= l < r < n`），并且存在下标 `l < p < q < r`，使得：

- `nums[l...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...r]` **严格** 递增。

请你从数组 `nums` 的所有三段式子数组中找出和最大的那个，并返回其 **最大** 和。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,-2,-1,-3,0,2,-1]

**输出：**-4

**解释：**

选择 `l = 1`, `p = 2`, `q = 3`, `r = 5`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[1...2] = [-2, -1]` 严格递增 (`-2 < -1`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[2...3] = [-1, -3]` 严格递减 (`-1 > -3`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[3...5] = [-3, 0, 2]` 严格递增 (`-3 < 0 < 2`)。
- 和 = `(-2) + (-1) + (-3) + 0 + 2 = -4`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [1,4,2,7]

**输出:** 14

**解释:**

选择 `l = 0`, `p = 1`, `q = 2`, `r = 3`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[0...1] = [1, 4]` 严格递增 (`1 < 4`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[1...2] = [4, 2]` 严格递减 (`4 > 2`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[2...3] = [2, 7]` 严格递增 (`2 < 7`)。
- 和 = `1 + 4 + 2 + 7 = 14`。

 

**提示:**

- `4 <= n = nums.length <= 10e5`
- `-10e9 <= nums[i] <= 10e9`
- 保证至少存在一个三段式子数组。
